description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a prominent gable roof covered in gray shingles. The exterior walls are finished in white, with large windows arranged in symmetrical rows on the front and rear facades. A detached garage is connected to the main house by a paved driveway, and there is a small landscaped area with trees and shrubs near the entrance. The front of the house includes a covered porch with black railings, providing a sheltered entryway. The rear of the house has a balcony and open patio area, offering outdoor living space. The overall design is clean and functional, with a blend of traditional and modern residential elements.
description: A two-story white house with a gray gable roof, symmetrical windows, a detached garage, and landscaped entryway. Features include a covered porch, balcony, and open patio.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gable roof, detached garage, and a small landscaped area with a tree.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the covered porch, symmetrical windows, and main entryway.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the driveway, garage, and additional landscaping visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the balcony, open patio, and multiple windows on both stories.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with black railings, single main door, and landscaped approach
